client_name.description: A human-readable name for the client.

client_description.description: A human-readable description for the client.

status.description: The status of the client - either `active` or `inactive`.

scopes.description: An array of scopes assigned to the client.

trusted_metadata.description: The `trusted_metadata` field contains an arbitrary JSON object of application-specific data. See the [Metadata](https://stytch.com/docs/api/metadata) reference for complete field behavior details.
